data.title: Clear RED markers in .test-index for playwright CLI migration tests
data.description:
## Description
Remove RED markers from .test-index for playwright CLI migration tests. These markers were added during the RED test phase but the tests now pass (GREEN). The markers must be removed before epic closure per CLAUDE.md rule.

RED markers to remove:
1. tests/fixtures/playwright: [test_playwright_cli_installed]
2. plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md: [test_mcp_guide_removed,test_cross_references_updated]
3. plugins/dso/docs/PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md: [test_cli_guide_exists,test_cli_guide_sections]
4. CLAUDE.md: [test_claude_md_no_mcp_refs]
5. plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: [test_config_ref_no_mcp]
6. plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md: [test_install_md_updated]
7. lifecycle migration entries

For each: verify the test passes, then remove the RED marker (convert to regular entry or remove if source file no longer exists).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No RED markers remain for playwright migration tests in .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q "\[test_.*playwright\|test_mcp_guide\|test_cli_guide\|test_claude_md_no_mcp\|test_config_ref_no_mcp\|test_install_md" .test-index
- [ ] All playwright migration tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
